title: Guest Cart → Login → Merge
description: Guest adds items to localStorage cart, logs in, and cart silently merges to the database.

flows.title: Add Item to Guest Cart
flows.trigger: Guest clicks 'Add to Cart' on listing detail page

steps.label: Client-side validation (own listing, already in cart, cart full)
Add item to localStorage cart (listingId + priceCents snapshot)
steps.notes: Guest cart is entirely localStorage-backed. No API calls.

steps.label: CartIcon badge count updates via Zustand store
Items grouped by seller for display
Render cart items with remove/clear actions
steps.notes: Checkout button is disabled in MVP.

paths.label: No — show empty state + browse CTA

flows.title: Cart Merge on Login
flows.trigger: Guest logs in with items in localStorage cart

steps.label: useCartMerge() detects auth state change
steps.notes: This is a background hook — the user sees nothing. It fires on login regardless of what page they're on.

steps.label: POST /api/cart/merge with guest items
steps.notes: Server validates every guest item: checks listing exists, not sold, not own listing, not already in DB cart.

steps.label: Skip invalid/duplicate/own-listing items
steps.notes: No errors surfaced to user — invalid items are silently dropped.

steps.label: Insert valid items into cart table (DB)
Clear localStorage guest cart
steps.notes: No toast, no redirect. Entirely silent. User's cart page now shows DB-backed items.
